transcript.content: 已经修到全绿了。 我做了两件事： - 把 Codex minor GC 默认允许的 guarded relation 放宽到包含 `continue` - 把 `codex-minor-gc-current-editor-update-after-detour` 收进固定 live eval case
继续扩 harder cases，把类似 GC-B 的自然中文多轮切题也收进固定回归

已经把 harder case 补进固定回归了。 新增 case： - `codex-minor-gc-zh-dense-multitopic-return` - 文件：[evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js)
要；尽量不是白名单，有硬编码嫌疑；
已经收住了，而且不是靠白名单。 我做了两步： - 把中文多轮切题 harder case 收进固定回归 - 再把 packaged guard 收紧成“不能覆盖 shadow guard 的否决”
那刚才不通过的测试，可以重新测试，预期是可以通过了对么？
能自动跑的，你帮我跑一遍
我已经替你自动跑了一遍： ```bash node scripts/eval-codex-context-minor-gc-live.js --format markdown ```
已经收成全绿了。 我继续做的两条通用修正是： - `continue` 下如果有 turn 被降成 `pin-only`，拒绝激活 - `summary-first` 不再强制优先；只要 raw keep 更轻，就统一退回 raw keep

decision.archive_summary: Active topic remains Codex minor-GC work. Recent resolved work: widened guarded relation to include continue, added harder Chinese multitopic regression coverage, tightened packaged/shadow guard interaction, reran evals, and reached green with two general fixes: reject continue when any required turn was demoted to pin-only, and stop forcing summary-first when raw-keep is lighter. Preserve the user's standing preference from t5: avoid whitelist-like or hardcoded handling; favor general logic over case-specific exceptions.
decision.reasoning_summary: This is the same active task, so relation=continue. The next turn mainly depends on the immediate '继续' plus the latest assistant state summary, not the older solved back-and-forth or test rerun confirmation. Those older turns are good eviction candidates. The user preference against whitelist/hardcoded behavior should survive as a semantic pin because it can still constrain the ongoing implementation even if the older raw turn leaves the prompt.
